parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title AU2048 Demo Mode Button Sequence Diagram

actor User
entity MainActivity
control Controller
entity MainActivityFragment
participant BoardView
database Model

User -> MainActivity : Starts App
activate MainActivity

MainActivity -> Controller : onCreate()
activate Controller

MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment : onCreate()
activate MainActivityFragment

MainActivityFragment -> BoardView : onCreateView()
activate BoardView

loop watntstoContinue == true
    User -> MainActivity : Press Demo Mode
    MainActivity -> Controller : ResetClick(View)
    Controller -> Controller : reset()
    Controller -> Model : setArr()
    Controller -> Model : setScore()
    Model --> Controller : doesWantToContinue()
    MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment : setupArrView()
    MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment : setArrView()
    MainActivityFragment -> BoardView : onCreateView()
    BoardView --> MainActivityFragment : BoardView

    alt demo == true
        alt button_direction == up
            MainActivity -> MainActivity : UpClick(View)
        else button_direction == left
            MainActivity -> MainActivity : LeftClick(View)
        else button_direction == down
            MainActivity -> MainActivity : DownClick(View)
        else button_direction == right
            MainActivity -> MainActivity : RightClick(View)
        end

        alt button_direction == up
            Controller -> Controller : shiftUp()
        else button_direction == left
            Controller -> Controller : shiftLeft()
        else button_direction == down
            Controller -> Controller : shiftDown()
        else button_direction == right
            Controller -> Controller : shiftRight()
        end

        Controller -> Model : setArr()
        Controller -> Model : setScore()
        Model --> Controller : doesWantToContinue()
        MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment : setupArrView()
        MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment : setArrView()
        MainActivityFragment -> BoardView : onCreateView()
        BoardView --> MainActivityFragment : BoardView

        alt noMovesPossible == false
            Controller --> MainActivity : checkWin()
            Controller --> MainActivity : win()
            Controller --> MainActivity : reset()
        else noMovesPossible == true
            Controller --> MainActivity : noMovesPossible()
            Controller --> MainActivity : gameover()
            Controller -> MainActivity : Action.DOWN
            Controller --> MainActivity : reset()
        end
    end
end

MainActivityFragment -> BoardView : onDestroy()
destroy BoardView

MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment : onDestroy()
destroy MainActivityFragment

destroy MainActivity

@enduml
```
